title: The AI Orchestrator: Multi-Agent Hub
promptText: A high-tech digital command center featuring a central holographic AI core overseeing a network of specialized autonomous agents, each represented by a unique glowing node, intricate circuitry patterns, futuristic UI/UX dashboard, cinematic lighting, dark mode with neon blue and gold accents, 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 render --ar 16:9 --v 6.0
